title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 267.697 - Sheep or goats deemed exposed, when
text:
267.697.  Sheep or goats deemed exposed, when. — Sheep or goats that are maintained on any premises that are adjacent to sheep or goats that are found to be infected* with scabies shall be considered as having been exposed to scabies.
(L. 1961 p. 26 § 9) 
*Word "affected" in original rolls.
